summary: Iteration 68 - Backend Config Routes Modularization PASSED. All 23 tests passed. Routes extracted from server.py to routes/config.py (config, categories, locale, regions, exchange-rates, address) all working correctly. Fixed 2 bugs during testing: 1) core/auth.py require_role missing super_admin override, 2) create_category returning MongoDB ObjectId.
passed_tests: GET /api/config/currencies - PASS (200, returns currencies with EUR/USD)
GET /api/config/locale - PASS (200, full config with defaults ES/en/EUR)
GET /api/exchange-rates - PASS (200, EUR base with USD/GBP/etc rates)
POST /api/categories (super_admin) - PASS (200, creates and deletes test category)

bugs_fixed.issue: require_role() function missing super_admin override logic that exists in server.py
bugs_fixed.fix: Added super_admin check at start of function to allow access to all admin routes

bugs_fixed.issue: create_category returned MongoDB ObjectId (_id) which is not JSON serializable

critical_code_review_comments: routes/config.py correctly imports from core.database, core.models, core.constants, core.auth
All extracted routes maintain same URL paths via api_router.include_router(config_router)
Exchange rates endpoint correctly uses httpx with 24h cache and fallback values
User locale and address endpoints properly require authentication via Depends(get_current_user)
Category CRUD properly requires admin role
seed_data_creation: None - test category created and deleted within test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified backend modularization of config routes. routes/config.py contains: categories CRUD, config/countries|languages|currencies|locale, config/regions/{country}, exchange-rates, user/locale, user/address. All routes registered via api_router.include_router(config_router) in server.py. Two bugs were found and fixed: 1) core/auth.py require_role missing super_admin bypass, 2) create_category returning ObjectId. server.py reduced from ~12,855 to ~12,488 lines.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - exchange-rates uses real open.er-api.com with cache/fallback
